Brand portal

Brand guidelines / v1.0

Built for
curious minds.

A living identity system for the people, ideas and discoveries that make Leicester a city with space in its future.

Explore the system →Get the assets

brand.leicesterspaceweek.com

The idea

Rooted in Leicester.
Oriented to the future.

Our identity brings civic pride, scientific ambition and open collaboration into one precise visual language. It is made to work from a social avatar to an exhibition wall.

01

Heritage

The fox grounds the event in Leicester and Leicestershire’s enduring civic identity.

02

Innovation

Orbital geometry connects the system to research, technology and discovery.

03

Collaboration

Clear, generous layouts make room for partners, communities and new ideas.

04

Future

A confident, accessible system that invites the next generation into space.

The logo system

One crest.
Every scale.

The fox, orbit and skyline form the core mark. Use it with calm authority: legible, flat, and always surrounded by room to breathe.

See logo rules and downloads →

Colour system

Dark skies.
A clear beacon.

Orbit Navy#0B1026
Beacon Amber#E2672A
Civic Violet#5B2A86
Steel Silver#C9CED6
Paper White#F4F2ED
Ink#14172B

A living toolkit

Guidance that works
in the real world.

Start with the essentials, then use the system to make everything from social posts and partner kits to presentations and wayfinding unmistakably Leicester Space Week.

Aa

Typography

Space Grotesk brings clarity and character; Inter makes every message easy to read.

◌

Visual language

Orbit lines, stars and local skyline details create a flexible supporting vocabulary.

↗

Applications

Practical layouts and principles for digital, print, partners and event spaces.

LEICESTER
SPACE WEEK

A shared visual language for an ambitious city of science, discovery and collaboration.
